# openai_assistant_file (Resource)

The assistant file resource allows users to attach files to assistants.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `assistant_id` (String) The ID of the assistant to attach the file to.
- `file_id` (String) The ID of the file to attach to the assistant.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Timestamp when the file was attached to the assistant.
- `id` (String) The identifier of the assistant file.
